commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=04f95be610a7d45e1ed993dbfc83dfc596e15062)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/agents/agent-command.ts` so the post-run session-store update uses `result.meta.agentMeta.sessionId` when present instead of always using the pre-run session id.

PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: automatic compaction can rotate `sessionIdUsed`, but current main passes the original `sessionId` to the session-store updater. The PR's changed path is also source-reproducibly incomplete because later transcript persistence still receives the original id.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code blocker is concrete, but the missing real behavior proof keeps this in contributor or maintainer review rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(agents): update session store with rotated session id after post-compaction transcript rotation
target.body:
## Summary

When `truncateAfterCompaction: true` triggers transcript rotation to a new session file during a run, `rotateTranscriptAfterCompaction()` creates a new session ID and records it in `result.meta.agentMeta.sessionId`. However, `updateSessionStoreAfterAgentRun()` was called with the original pre-rotation `sessionId`, so `sessions.json` still pointed at the old file. The next message would try to lock a stale session file, causing a deadlock.

This change uses `result.meta.agentMeta.sessionId` when available, keeping the session store in sync with the rotated file.

Closes #88040

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Agents / session store

## Real behavior proof

**Drift proof**: `npx vitest run src/agents/agent-command.test.ts src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts` — all 66 tests pass both with and without the change.

**Code inspection**: The full post-run path checks two call sites:
1. `agentCommandInternal` (line 1630): passes `sessionId` to `updateSessionStoreAfterAgentRun` — this PR fixes it
2. `/compact` command: uses `incrementCompactionCount` which already handles `newSessionId` correctly — unaffected

The fix uses `result?.meta?.agentMeta?.sessionId ?? sessionId` so when no rotation occurs (`agentMeta.sessionId` is undefined), behavior is identical to current main.

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

target.title: feat(telegram): opt-in interleaved progress lane
target.body:
## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` — inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** — no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** — tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** — consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged
- **Cumulative reasoning detection** — normalizes italic wrappers before `startsWith` comparison so cumulative snapshots that extend a line (e.g. `_alpha_` → `_alpha beta_`) replace rather than duplicate

## Depends on

- #80046 (CLI tool_use event bridge with sanitized args)
- #85381 (CLI thinking_delta events, stacked on #80046)

## Changed files

- `extensions/telegram/src/interleaved-progress.ts` — pure render helpers (gate, sanitize, header-strip, message render, reasoning checkpoint with italic-aware cumulative detection, status-line append)
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` — wire callbacks through renderer with fallback; clear rolling timer in `finally`; title-less event fallbacks (`planning`, `approval requested`, `patch`)
- `src/config/types.telegram.ts` + `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` — opt-in flag schema
- Config surface docs + bundled channel metadata regeneration

## Test plan

- [x] 24 unit tests covering: disabled-by-default, explicit opt-out, tool-progress-off, no-reasoning-lane, header dedup, rolling-timer lifecycle, whitespace-collapse + length cap, reasoning checkpoint cumulative delivery, italic-wrapper-aware cumulative detection
- [x] Live Telegram verification with `interleavedProgress: true`

## Live proof (2026-05-29)

**Gateway log:**
```
2026-05-29T10:10:02 agent model: claude-cli-interactive/claude-opus-4-8 (thinking=max, fast=off)
2026-05-29T10:10:02 gateway ready
2026-05-29T10:10:46 Inbound message telegram:8661849123 (direct, 35 chars)
```

**Telegram — reasoning + tool-use lines in the interleaved lane:**

![proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anagnorisis2peripeteia/openclaw/2ec1bed2aa0caf2a0a8311a458dcd1bc532ce68c/proof-assets/interleaved-progress-telegram-2026-05-29.jpg)
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia

commands.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia

target.title: feat(telegram): opt-in interleaved progress lane
target.body:
## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` — inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** — no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** — tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** — consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged
- **Cumulative reasoning detection** — normalizes italic wrappers before `startsWith` comparison so cumulative snapshots that extend a line (e.g. `_alpha_` → `_alpha beta_`) replace rather than duplicate

## Depends on

- #80046 (CLI tool_use event bridge with sanitized args)
- #85381 (CLI thinking_delta events, stacked on #80046)

## Changed files

- `extensions/telegram/src/interleaved-progress.ts` — pure render helpers (gate, sanitize, header-strip, message render, reasoning checkpoint with italic-aware cumulative detection, status-line append)
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` — wire callbacks through renderer with fallback; clear rolling timer in `finally`; title-less event fallbacks (`planning`, `approval requested`, `patch`)
- `src/config/types.telegram.ts` + `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` — opt-in flag schema
- Config surface docs + bundled channel metadata regeneration

## Test plan

- [x] 24 unit tests covering: disabled-by-default, explicit opt-out, tool-progress-off, no-reasoning-lane, header dedup, rolling-timer lifecycle, whitespace-collapse + length cap, reasoning checkpoint cumulative delivery, italic-wrapper-aware cumulative detection
- [x] Live Telegram verification with `interleavedProgress: true`

## Live proof (2026-05-29)

**Gateway log:**
```
2026-05-29T10:10:02 agent model: claude-cli-interactive/claude-opus-4-8 (thinking=max, fast=off)
2026-05-29T10:10:02 gateway ready
2026-05-29T10:10:46 Inbound message telegram:8661849123 (direct, 35 chars)
```

**Telegram — reasoning + tool-use lines in the interleaved lane:**

![proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anagnorisis2peripeteia/openclaw/2ec1bed2aa0caf2a0a8311a458dcd1bc532ce68c/proof-assets/interleaved-progress-telegram-2026-05-29.jpg)
